app.name: Escort Radar
footer.title: Premium 18+ nightlife marketplace.
footer.notice: Privacy, consent, moderation, and local-law compliance come first.
baba.homeTitle: Studio-built infrastructure for premium geo discovery
baba.cards.moderationText: Human-led review workflows supported by structured safety signals and platform tooling.
baba.cards.geoText: Approximate-area discovery, radius controls, and privacy-first location logic.
baba.cards.marketplaceText: Subscription-ready profiles, service menus, bookings, and creator operations.
baba.cards.privacyText: Age, consent, reporting, removal, and GDPR-oriented foundations for a serious 18+ platform.
tokens.title: Escort Tokens
tokens.subtitle: Buy premium credits for marketplace access, radar boosts, VIP bookings, private chat, live cam unlocks, profile highlights, tips, and featured placement.
tokens.loginRequired: Login required to select a token package.
tokens.checkoutSoon: Checkout flow is prepared and coming soon.
tokens.checkoutPending: Token package request created. Admin approval will complete the internal credit top-up.
tokens.closedNotice: Closed internal platform credits. Crypto mechanics stay under the hood.
payments.manualBankTransferInstruction: Please include your account email and order number in the payment reference. Your order will be activated after manual confirmation.
age.title: 18+ access
age.copy: Escort Radar is a legal 18+ marketplace. Enter only if you are an adult and agree to report illegal, coerced, or non-consensual content.
home.heroSubtitle: Live availability, verified profiles and fast contact in one premium radar feed.
home.tagline: A private geo marketplace for discreet, high-end nightlife discovery.
home.demo: Demo profiles are fictional until verified advertisers join.
home.sections.vipText: Discreet booking requests with advertiser consent, ready for future payment flows.
home.features.available.title: Live availability
home.features.available.text: Status signals show who is available, busy, or offline right now.
home.features.private.title: Discreet profiles
home.features.private.text: Exact locations are never shown. Radar works with approximate areas.
home.features.mobile.title: Radius & mobile
home.features.mobile.text: Filter by distance, service radius, and visit options.
home.features.clubs.title: Clubs & events
home.features.clubs.text: Prepared for curated nightlife partners and VIP events.
home.features.privacy.title: Privacy & verification
home.features.privacy.text: Moderation, reports, age checks, and removals are built into the foundation.
home.features.cities.title: Next cities

authAccountType.clientText: Explore radar, save access, and use premium marketplace tools.
authAccountType.escortText: Create a verified independent profile and manage bookings.
authAccountType.businessText: Prepare access for an agency, salon, club, or live studio.
onboarding.headline: Premium Escort Marketplace
onboarding.subtitle: Verified profiles, geo radar, VIP booking, and full privacy.
onboarding.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and platform rules
onboarding.acceptRequired: Please accept the terms and confirm 18+ before continuing.
accountType.privateDescription: A private account is intended for one individual advertiser. One phone number may only be assigned to the same person. Multiple phone numbers are allowed, but they must belong to the same individual. If several people advertise under one phone number, choose Agency, Massage Salon, or Club/Party.
phone.privateWarning: One phone number cannot lead to listings for multiple different people on a private account. Choose Agency, Massage Salon, or Club/Party for multi-person operations.
phone.confirmSameOwner: I confirm that the phone numbers belong to the same individual advertiser.
adminAccess.headline: Escort Radar Control Center
adminAccess.subtitle: Moderation • Verification • Marketplace Infrastructure
adminAccess.auditNotice: Every admin action is intended for audit logging and manual human accountability.
radar.title: Discover profiles by radius
radar.subtitle: A premium radar for status, distance, and discreet areas.
radar.privacy: Exact locations are never shown. Radar uses approximate areas for privacy.
radar.fallbackNotice: Location is unavailable. Radar is using the city center as a discreet fallback.
city.copy: Premium 18+ profiles with status, radius, service menus, and moderated visibility.
city.safety: All listings must be 18+, consensual, verified, and compliant with local law.
profile.fallbackDescription: Premium profile with details on the profile page.

profile.bookingSuccess: Booking request sent for advertiser review.

dashboard.guestTitle: A dashboard matched to your role
dashboard.guestSubtitle: Clients use a free account for radar and tokens. Advertisers and businesses go through separate verification and premium activation.

dashboard.client.subtitle: Browse radar, use tokens, and save favorite profiles. This account does not publish listings.

dashboard.business.title: Business dashboard

dashboard.business.verificationCopy: Business profile publication will be available after manual verification and premium package activation.
dashboard.business.multiProfileCopy: The dashboard is prepared for agencies, salons, clubs, and studios. Multi-profile tools will be enabled in the next step.

referral.placeholder: This referral route is prepared for premium onboarding attribution.
dashboard.locationHint: Exact GPS is optional and is never shown publicly.

admin.title: Admin Control Room
admin.subtitle: Operate verification, reports, test accounts, booking requests, platform settings, and sensitive safety cases from one premium console.

admin.legalNotice: Administrator may suspend or block listings that violate local law, platform rules, consent, age verification, or safety policies.
admin.escalationPlaceholder: Escalated for human review and authority handoff placeholder.

visibility.no_images: Hidden: add at least one image.
legal.copy1: This page is a professional placeholder for a legal 18+ marketplace. Final text must be reviewed by a qualified lawyer before publication.
legal.copy2: Production policy must cover age verification, consent, prohibited content, exploitation prevention, takedown requests, GDPR rights, and moderation.
legal.technologyCopy1: Escort Radar is developed and maintained by BABA AI.
legal.technologyCopy2: All software, infrastructure, UI systems, and marketplace technology are proprietary intellectual property of BABA AI.
legal.technologyCopy3: Unauthorized copying or redistribution is prohibited.
